io.bloviate.ext.DatabaseSupport

Package
Description
io.bloviate.db
 
io.bloviate.ext
 
io.bloviate.testcontainers
 

  • Uses of DatabaseSupport in io.bloviate.db

    Methods in io.bloviate.db that return DatabaseSupport
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DatabaseSupport
    DatabaseConfiguration.databaseSupport()
    Returns the value of the databaseSupport record component.
    Constructors in io.bloviate.db with parameters of type DatabaseSupport
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DatabaseConfiguration(int batchSize, long defaultRowCount, DatabaseSupport databaseSupport, Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations)
    Creates a configuration with no custom GeneratorRegistry and a base seed of 0.
     
    DatabaseConfiguration(int batchSize, long defaultRowCount, DatabaseSupport databaseSupport, Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations, long seed)
    Creates a configuration with the given base seed and no custom GeneratorRegistry.
     
    DatabaseConfiguration(int batchSize, long defaultRowCount, DatabaseSupport databaseSupport, Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations, long seed, CommitStrategy commitStrategy)
    Creates a configuration with the given base seed and CommitStrategy, and no custom GeneratorRegistry.
     
    DatabaseConfiguration(int batchSize, long defaultRowCount, DatabaseSupport databaseSupport, Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations, GeneratorRegistry generatorRegistry)
    Creates a configuration with a custom GeneratorRegistry and a base seed of 0.
     
    DatabaseConfiguration(int batchSize, long defaultRowCount, DatabaseSupport databaseSupport, Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations, GeneratorRegistry generatorRegistry, long seed)
    Creates a configuration with a custom GeneratorRegistry and base seed, and the default CommitStrategy (preserves the original six-argument signature).
     
    DatabaseConfiguration(int batchSize, long defaultRowCount, DatabaseSupport databaseSupport, Set<TableConfiguration> tableConfigurations, GeneratorRegistry generatorRegistry, long seed, CommitStrategy commitStrategy)
    Normalizes a null commitStrategy to CommitStrategy.connectionDefault() so the back-compatible behavior applies whenever a caller does not specify one.

  • Uses of DatabaseSupport in io.bloviate.ext

    Classes in io.bloviate.ext that implement DatabaseSupport
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractDatabaseSupport
    Base DatabaseSupport that maps columns to generators through a JDBCType-keyed registry of GeneratorFactory entries.
    class 
    CockroachDBSupport
    CockroachDB-specific DatabaseSupport.
    class 
    DefaultSupport
    Fallback DatabaseSupport for generic or unknown JDBC databases.
    class 
    MySQLSupport
    MySQL-specific DatabaseSupport.
    class 
    PostgresSupport
    PostgreSQL-specific DatabaseSupport.
    Methods in io.bloviate.ext that return DatabaseSupport
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static DatabaseSupport
    DatabaseSupport.forConnection(Connection connection)
    Selects a DatabaseSupport by reading the product name from the connection's metadata.
    static DatabaseSupport
    DatabaseSupport.forProduct(String productName)
    Selects a DatabaseSupport for the given JDBC product name (as reported by DatabaseMetaData.getDatabaseProductName()), so callers don't have to hardcode a specific implementation.

  • Uses of DatabaseSupport in io.bloviate.testcontainers

    Methods in io.bloviate.testcontainers with parameters of type DatabaseSupport
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BloviateContainers.Builder
    BloviateContainers.Builder.databaseSupport(DatabaseSupport databaseSupport)
    Overrides the auto-detected DatabaseSupport.
